overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Mafia III showing a character in a beige suit walking and running along a wet residential sidewalk at night. The scene features traditional New Orleans-style shotgun houses, vintage 1960s cars, and occasional pedestrians, with streetlights and house lights illuminating the overcast night.

events.description: red vintage pickup truck drives past on the left side of the street
pedestrian with umbrella passes close by on the right, temporarily obscuring view

agents.ego_description: walking briskly along the wet sidewalk in a beige suit

tall street light illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet residential sidewalk at night, passing a red bungalow house with a wooden picket fence. A red pickup truck drives by on the left, and a pedestrian with an umbrella passes closely on the right. Vintage cars are parked along the street under overhead power lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: row of traditional shotgun houses with illuminated porches

events.description: transition from single house view to continuous row of connected shotgun houses
passing by porch with people sitting in rocking chairs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the row of houses with front porches

notable_agents.action: residents sitting on front porch in rocking chairs watching the street

entered.detail: traditional wooden shotgun houses with raised porches and columns
warm yellow lights illuminating the front porches
large oak tree with dense canopy overhanging the sidewalk
pink and white classic sedan parked on the street
white mailbox on a post near the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Moving past the initial house, the scene opens into a continuous row of traditional shotgun houses with warm porch lights. Residents sit in rocking chairs on a porch to the right, while a pink vintage car is parked on the left. Large oak trees overhang the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed residential block transitioning to industrial fencing

events.description: transition from wooden picket fences to chain link fencing on the right
passing under brighter street lamp illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing past a blue shotgun house and ornate Victorian home

entered.detail: blue painted wooden house with white porch railings
white painted wooden picket fence
mint green classic sedan parked on the street
decorative wooden house with intricate trim and gables
metal chain link fence enclosing a property

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a blue shotgun house with white railings and a white picket fence, then transitions past an ornate Victorian house. A chain link fence appears on the right side, replacing the wooden fences, while a mint green vintage car is parked on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and stop sign

events.description: approaching stop sign and crosswalk at intersection
character steps off curb and begins crossing the street at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection and crossing the street at the marked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: green truck waiting at the stop sign at the intersection

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the intersection
white painted pedestrian crossing lines
four-way street intersection with traffic markings
green utility truck stopped at the intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street intersection, the character passes a stop sign and enters a crosswalk. A green truck waits at the intersection ahead. The chain link fence continues alongside the sidewalk on the right as the character crosses from the residential sidewalk onto the asphalt street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wet residential sidewalk at night, transitioning from a quiet neighborhood stretch toward a busy street intersection. It begins by passing a red bungalow and a wooden picket fence as a red pickup truck drives by and a pedestrian with an umbrella crosses the path. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a row of traditional shotgun houses with warm porch lights and residents in rocking chairs, while large oak trees begin to overhang the sidewalk. The environment then shifts past a blue shotgun house and an ornate Victorian home, where the wooden boundaries are replaced by a chain link fence and a mint green vintage car appears parked on the left. Finally, the camera approaches a stop sign and enters a crosswalk, moving from the residential sidewalk onto the asphalt street as a green truck waits at the intersection ahead.
